Example sample metadata for pfIsosHeomeV1

Source: R/data.R
pfIsosHeomeV1_sampleMeta.Rd

Per-sample metadata for the samples in pfIsosHeomeV1, for demonstrating the sample-metadata sidebar. Subset to the example samples with columns that are constant across the subset dropped. The sample column matches pfIsosHeomeV1's s_Sample.

Usage

pfIsosHeomeV1_sampleMeta

Format

A data frame with 61 rows (one per sample):

sample

Sample identifier (matches s_Sample).

collection_date

Collection date, where known.

country

Country of origin.

site

Collection site.

collection_year

Collection year, where known.

region

Geographic region.

subRegion

Geographic sub-region.

secondaryRegion

Broader (continent-level) region.

On this page
